case_title: OPORTUN INC.(FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. MEYBEL ALEJANDRA CAMPOS LOVOS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $633.33 FILED BY OPORTUN INC.(FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT LOVOS, MEYBEL ALEJANDRA CAMPOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.(FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOVOS, MEYBEL ALEJANDRA CAMPOS $313.33 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $388.33, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: 45.00) SERVED JUL-18-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOVOS, MEYBEL ALEJANDRA CAMPOS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-14-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-09-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARLEN RAMOS--LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-09-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE MARIA BLANC ZOCO. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
